escalations.title: Handlebars JavaScript Injection & Prototype Pollution (CVSS 9.8 RCE)
escalations.exploit: Attacker supplies malicious Handlebars template → arbitrary JS execution during ts-jest test compilation. Build artifacts could embed malicious code.
escalations.impact: Remote code execution, information disclosure, state corruption in test pipeline.
escalations.fix: Update ts-jest to a version that pins handlebars >=4.7.9. Monitor upstream releases.

p1_backlog.title: Traceability Enforcer Blind Spot: Specifications/ Never Scanned
p1_backlog.detail: Enforcer only targets Plans/*/requirements.md. All three Specifications/ files — the project's domain truth — are never validated. Running the default returns PASSED while 76+ requirements remain unimplemented.
p1_backlog.fix: Extend enforcer to accept --spec-dir Specifications/ or add a second gate step running --file against each Specifications/*.md. Update CLAUDE.md verification-gates block.

p1_backlog.title: Major Spec Drift: dev-workflow-platform.md FR-001–069 Fully Unimplemented
p1_backlog.detail: 69 FRs for a SQLite-backed dev workflow platform (feature requests, bug tracking, pipeline orchestration, 9 frontend pages) exist in Specifications/ but have zero implementation in Source/. Enforcer reports 76 MISSING when pointed at this spec.
p1_backlog.fix: Determine canonical intent: annotate as 'Status: Planned/Backlog' if future work, or open a P1 implementation gap for TheATeam pipeline. Either way, extend enforcer to catch this.

p1_backlog.title: FR-TMP-* in platform/ Is Invisible to the Enforcer
p1_backlog.detail: tiered-merge-pipeline.md FR-TMP-001–010 are correctly implemented in platform/orchestrator/lib/workflow-engine.js with proper // Verifies: comments, but the enforcer only scans Source/ and E2E/. Any regression in platform/ traceability is invisible to the gate.
p1_backlog.fix: Add platform/ to the enforcer's source_dirs (with node_modules/ excluded). This brings FR-TMP coverage into the automated gate.

p2_backlog.title: Missing dependencyCheckDuration Prometheus Histogram
p2_backlog.detail: FR-dependency-metrics requires 4 Prometheus metrics. Three counters are implemented; the dependencyCheckDuration histogram is absent. BFS cycle-detection has no latency visibility.
p2_backlog.fix: Add Histogram for dependency_check_duration_ms in metrics.ts. Instrument hasUnresolvedBlockers() and isReady() in dependency.ts.

p2_backlog.title: Silent Error Swallowing: 5 Frontend Catch Blocks Without Logging
p2_backlog.detail: Each catch sets error state for the UI but does not log. Architecture rule: every catch must re-throw, log with full context, or explicitly document suppression. No frontend logger abstraction exists.
p2_backlog.fix: Create Source/Frontend/src/utils/logger.ts (dev-mode structured logging). Instrument all 5 catch sites.

p2_backlog.title: brace-expansion DoS (Memory Exhaustion)
p2_backlog.detail: Zero-step sequence in shell expansion causes unbounded recursion, process hang, and memory exhaustion. Dev/build only.

p3_backlog.title: Vite Path Traversal in Optimized Deps Map Handling
p3_backlog.detail: Path traversal in .map file handling. Dev server only.
p3_backlog.fix: npm install vite@latest (major version bump, 2h effort)

p3_backlog.title: Vitest / Vite-Node / @vitest/mocker Transitive Vulnerabilities
p3_backlog.detail: All route back to Vite + esbuild vulnerabilities. Root cause is Vite 5 major version lag.
p3_backlog.fix: npm install vite@latest vitest@latest (major version bump, 2h effort)

p3_backlog.title: esbuild CORS Bypass in Dev Server
p3_backlog.detail: Dev server allows any website to send requests and read responses, enabling source code exfiltration. Dev only.
p3_backlog.fix: npm install vite@latest (pins esbuild to patched version)

p3_backlog.title: eslint-disable on react-hooks/exhaustive-deps Without Rationale
p3_backlog.fix: Add inline comments explaining why the deps array is intentionally incomplete.

p3_backlog.title: Duplicate Test Files: tests/ vs tests/pages/
p3_backlog.fix: Consolidate to tests/pages/; confirm no unique cases before deleting root-level files.

p3_backlog.title: Enforcer Extracts Seed-Data IDs as Requirement IDs
p3_backlog.fix: Tighten extraction regex to require >=3 digit chars, or use two-phase check with table-row anchoring.

p4_backlog.title: DebugPortalPage: No Traceability Comment, No Test
p4_backlog.fix: Add // Verifies: FR-WF-009 and a minimal render test confirming iframe src.
